title: ariocarpus elongatus
intro: Ariocarpus elongatus, also known as the "living rock," is a rare and unique species of cactus that belongs to the family of Cactaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ariocarpus elongatus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat various infections, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Ariocarpus elongatus can be made by drying and crushing the plant, and then using it in teas, tinctures, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
